zh.Liedekerke, Brabant, Belgium: 比利時布拉班特利德凱爾克

zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnould de Gavre IV於1318年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫利時，他的父親Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight26歲，母親Yolande De Elsloo26歲。他和Jeanne De Rasseghem至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1387年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.Schorisse, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫利
zh-hans.Liedekerke, Brabant, Belgium: 比利时布拉班特利德凱爾克
zh-hans.Schorisse, Flandre, Orientale, Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnould de Gavre IV于1318年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫利时，他的父亲Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight26岁，母亲Yolande De Elsloo26岁。他和Jeanne De Rasseghem至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1387年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Köber (see Kober ) or Göber (see Gober ).

variants.name: Kober
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Bernhard, Angelika, Dieter, Ernst, Erwin, Gottlieb, Konrad, Manfred, Reinhold, Sepp, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a shortened derivative of the personal name Jakob (see Jacob ).

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kober, German Kober ‘basket’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a basket maker or perhaps a nickname for someone who carried a basket on his back.

nameMeanings.name: Arnould
meanings: Saxon, Latin: Faithful to his honour; help in war, helping lord; powerful lord.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnould de Gavre IV was born in 1318, in Schorisse, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight, was 26 and his mother, Yolande De Elsloo, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Jeanne De Rasseghem. He died in 1387, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnould de Gavre IV est né en 1318, à Schorisse, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Yolande De Elsloo, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Jeanne De Rasseghem. Il est décédé en 1387, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnould de Gavre IV 1318 in Schorisse, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight 26 und seine Mutter Yolande De Elsloo 26. Er hatte mit Jeanne De Rasseghem mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1387 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnould de Gavre IV è nato il nel 1318 nel Schorisse, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Yolande De Elsloo, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Jeanne De Rasseghem. Morì nel 1387, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.Schorisse, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンスチオリッセ
ja.Liedekerke, Brabant, Belgium: ベルギーブラバントリーデケルク
ja.Schorisse, Flandre, Orientale, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンスチオリッセ
ja.lifeSummary: Arnould de Gavre IVが1318年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンスチオリッセで生まれた時，父Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knightは26歳，母Yolande De Elslooは26歳であった。彼はJeanne De Rasseghemとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1387年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnould de Gavre IV(이)가 1318년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 슈리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande De Elsloo(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Jeanne De Rasseghem(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnould de Gavre IV nasceu em 1318, em Schorisse, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Yolande De Elsloo, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Jeanne De Rasseghem. Ele faleceu em 1387, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnould de Gavre IV родился в 1318 г. в местности щаурисс, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande De Elsloo, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Jeanne De Rasseghem. Он умер в 1387 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arnould de Gavre IV nació en 1318, en Schorisse, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Sir Gérard Guillaume de Gavre knight, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Yolande De Elsloo, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Jeanne De Rasseghem. Murió en 1387, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
